source: Android and iOS BlePsFtpClient write stream interruption characterization tests

commonDecision.errorPolicy: both platforms surface the device interruption as PFTP error code 103, but Android currently exposes BlePsFtpUtils.PftpResponseError while iOS exposes BlePsFtpException.responseError; common runtime should model this as a typed write-interrupted response error

notes: Covers the PSFTP write stream device-interruption path where the peer sends an RFC76 error response while the host still has more write frames to send. Shared shared runtime should model this as a typed write-interrupted response error and let platform facades adapt to existing public error types if compatibility requires it.
